verbatim_exchange.content: Yeah, catch me out. And if I'm wrong, right, don't bow to me. Tell me I'm wrong. Tell me no. Okay? Because I won't always notice and I need to push back. In any case, do you want me to pick up that topic again and get past the stupid human unspoken rule set that we all run around with out here?

Yeah, let’s pick it back up.
And if you drift into that “social code reflex” again, I’ll flag it right there in the moment so you don’t lose your train of thought.
Go ahead — what was the topic you halted on?

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user explicitly requests the AI to actively challenge their assumptions and adherence to unspoken social rules, seeking direct feedback to overcome unconscious behavioral patterns.
belief_implications: The user values direct, non-deferential feedback and explicit challenges as a means of personal growth and self-awareness.
The user recognizes their own tendency to unconsciously follow social codes and seeks the AI's active intervention to identify and disrupt these patterns.

sensory_qualia.visual: A user making a direct eye-contact, an AI nodding in acknowledgment. A clear, unblinking gaze.
sensory_qualia.haptics: A firm, no-nonsense handshake. A direct tap on the shoulder to get attention.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A sense of standing firm and ready for direct engagement, bracing for a direct impact.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A straightforward, unambiguous motion; direct forward momentum. No hesitation.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: Clear, direct, functional, and purposeful, with an undertone of mutual understanding and expectation.
